SEARCH
Package com.berryrock.integrationhub.util

Class AddressNormalizer

java.lang.Object
com.berryrock.integrationhub.util.AddressNormalizer
@Component public class AddressNormalizer extends Object
Normalizes raw address strings and builds composite comparison keys. The canonical normalization implementation shared by both the startup-time batch pipeline (AddressPipelineService) and the API-triggered sync path (AddressSyncService). Transformations applied (in order):
  1. Uppercase the entire string
  2. Remove periods, commas, hash signs, and apostrophes
  3. Collapse and trim whitespace
  4. Strip ZIP+4 suffix down to 5-digit ZIP
  5. Abbreviate street suffixes (STREET -> ST, AVENUE -> AVE, etc.)
  6. Resolve city aliases (OKLAHOMA CITY -> OKC, ST LOUIS / SAINT LOUIS -> STL, KANSAS CITY -> KC)
  7. Abbreviate directional words — compound before cardinal to avoid NW being parsed as N + W
  8. Strip trailing apartment/unit suffixes (e.g., "- 12" at end of string)

  • Constructor Details

    • AddressNormalizer

      public AddressNormalizer()

  • Method Details

    • normalize

      public String normalize(String address)
      Normalizes a single address component string. Applies the full transformation chain described in the class Javadoc. Passing null returns an empty string rather than throwing.
      Parameters:
      address - raw address string; may be null
      Returns:
      normalized uppercase string with punctuation removed and abbreviations applied; empty string if input is null

    • buildNormalizedKey

      public String buildNormalizedKey(String addressLine, String city, String state, String postalCode)
      Builds a pipe-delimited composite key from the four address components. Each component is individually normalized via normalize(java.lang.String) before being concatenated with | as the delimiter. A null component contributes an empty segment (two consecutive pipes) rather than being skipped, so keys remain structurally consistent regardless of which fields are populated. Example result: "123 MAIN ST|TULSA|OK|74101"
      Parameters:
      addressLine - street address component; may be null
      city - city component; may be null
      state - state component; may be null
      postalCode - ZIP or postal code component; may be null
      Returns:
      pipe-delimited normalized key
